I kinda got used to not being the most liked in the community because of some pretty bad slip-ups I had in the past which were pretty bad. I have since tried improving as a person and I like to think I did well. As for the reviews, I understood people having issues with me complaining about engines, I have deleted all of those reviews. But other than that I think they're my opinion which I am entitled to having...
FUCK NOT THAT GUY, he once just straight up started sexually harassing me in a server but that's a story for later
